failure_signature: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test(#25782) and bring it back before 2021-07-29.")
root_cause_explanation: This change is primarily a test-infra migration: it moves gocheck-style tests (testkit + `*check.C`) to Go `testing.T` + testify/require. Such migrations often reduce flakiness by using a more standard test runner and clearer assertions/cleanup patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate deprecated gocheck-based tests to `testing.T` + testify/require.

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test(#25782) and bring it back before 2021-07-29.")
